ab: gunluw cu yaken mu hira’ musa’ cika babainaran. maras ci lanlamu’ na ṟagu’ pinmuhi’ ni nak. tumahuk ci nani’un halan ni maginbiniy uṟi.
ch: 昨天我跟奶奶去市集擺攤，奶奶帶了許多自己種的蔬菜去，也製作了原住民美食給大家。
en: Yesterday, I went to the market with my grandmother to set up a stall. My grandmother brought a lot of vegetables that she grew herself and also prepared indigenous cuisine for everyone.

ab: kisli’ naha ka babinaran ni yaki’ ki. payux ci’uli’ miniy ka urik lu nasubi’ ni, habaṟaw ci’uli’ moh tumalang mani’ ci tinahuk ni uṟi.
ch: 大家很喜歡奶奶的攤位，辣椒和車輪茄很多人買，許多人來品嘗她煮的菜餚。
en: Everyone loved my grandmother’s stall. Many people bought the chilis and African eggplants, and many people came to taste the dishes she cooked.

ab: ramas caṟung ni’un ka aṟingu’ singut lu rangil tinahuk ni. kelan na asinuw baṟowk nanahi’ pinahnuk na ma’uw uṟi. as rong ci ci’uli ka sinkanaxan ni, moh matikaluw babinaran min kora’ naha.
ch: 她煮的樹豆湯和糯米飯非常好吃，還有用山豬肉煮的山胡椒滷肉，味道吸引了很多客人，大家都來我們攤位排隊。
en: The pigeon pea soup and sticky rice she cooked were delicious, as well as the braised pork with maqaw pepper and wild boar meat. The flavors attracted many customers, and everyone lined up at our stall.

ab: tumahuk ci nani’un ka yaki’ hang ga, tapeh cu ci ci’uli’ sisyaw kung. yotas ka ke’ mu maha, “pinmuhi’ min nak ka ṟagu’ hani. aṟat pinle’an ci ayu’. nahaṟi’ moh miniy!”
ch: 奶奶煮東西的時候，我在旁邊招攬客人。我在一旁大喊著：「蔬菜都是自己種的，天然有機，趕快來買喔!」
en: While my grandmother was cooking, I was on the side attracting customers. I shouted, \"The vegetables are self-grown, all-natural and organic! Come and buy now!\"

ab: mingagos tikiy, masu’ min maginbiniy la. kumaṟal ka yaki’ mu maha, “utux ci isu’ ka rumow la,” ma.
ch: 我們的東西很快就賣完了，奶奶說：「都是因為有你的幫忙。」
en: Our goods sold out quickly, and my grandmother said, \"It’s all thanks to your help.\"

ab: inohan min hani ga, wal mu ba’un caṟung ka pinmuhi’ lu kinuba’ ci nani’un na itaṟal la. ba’un mu kora’ ka abuk na paginbiniy uṟi la.
ch: 這個活動，我學到了有關原住民植物和食品的知識，並且體驗到了擺攤的辛苦。
en: Through this event, I learned about indigenous plants and food and experienced the hard work of running a stall.

ab: taxan mu yonani sunkisli’ nak ci nani’un na kinnabkisan rali’ ka yaki’ mu ga, maku patatiṟuw lu tirahu’ ka linlungan mu.
ch: 看到了奶奶對傳統食物的熱愛，我感到非常驕傲和榮幸。
en: Seeing my grandmother’s passion for traditional food, I feel very proud and honored.
